hero.headline: MY LIFE
hero.subline: By a lifter, for lifters. Free.

training.headline: The smartest training app you'll never have to pay for.
training.subline: AI weight suggestions, personal coach, Athlete Score — free.

features.title: Active Workout
features.subtitle: AI weight suggestions, PR detection
features.description: Progressive overload on autopilot. The app suggests the ideal weight based on your training history.

features.title: Athlete Score
features.subtitle: 0–1000. Five dimensions.
features.description: Strength, endurance, consistency, volume, progress. One honest number representing your entire fitness level.

features.title: Coach Arved
features.subtitle: Not a chatbot. Arved.
features.description: He knows your PRs, your weak muscles, your missed sessions. Responds like a human.

features.title: Splits & Plans
features.subtitle: Arnold, PPL, Bro Split — or your own
features.description: Pre-built splits or fully custom programming. All exercises, all muscle groups.

features.title: Community & Forum
features.subtitle: See who's training live
features.description: See in real time who's in the gym. Cheffe role for the strongest. DMs, forum, stronger together.

features.title: Stats & Analytics
features.subtitle: Lifetime tracking of your strength
features.description: Volume, weight, reps — tracked across your entire training career.

comparison.headline: Why not just use another app?

nutrition.headline: Stop guessing what to eat.
nutrition.subline: AI-powered nutrition tracking. Macros that match your training.
nutrition.f1: AI nutrition plan based on your training goals
nutrition.f2: Sync with MyLife Training (calories ↔ workout volume)

life.label: Planned
life.headline: Habits that actually stick.
life.subline: Not the 10th habit tracker. The only one connected to your training.

cta.headline: Ready?
cta.subline: Start your first workout in 2 minutes.
cta.donationCopy: This app is built in free time. Free. Always. If you want it to keep going:
